additional_rules.name: latest-image-tag-in-values
additional_rules.message: Image tag 'latest' in Helm values — use a specific version or appVersion for reproducible deployments
additional_rules.fix_hint: Set image.tag to a specific version (e.g., '1.2.3') or leave empty to use Chart.appVersion

additional_rules.name: secrets-in-values
additional_rules.message: Plaintext secret in Helm values file — secrets committed to Git are a security risk
additional_rules.fix_hint: Use Sealed Secrets, External Secrets Operator, or SOPS-encrypted values files for secret management

additional_rules.name: missing-resource-limits
additional_rules.message: Container definition may be missing resource limits — set resources.limits for CPU and memory
additional_rules.fix_hint: Add resources: {{ toYaml .Values.resources | nindent 12 }} to the container spec and define defaults in values.yaml

additional_rules.name: missing-values-schema
additional_rules.message: Consider adding values.schema.json for chart values validation
additional_rules.fix_hint: Create values.schema.json with JSON Schema defining required fields, types, and constraints for values.yaml
